productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Solid Navy Blue Sweatshirt
description: Composition Navy blue reversible sleeveless hooded sweatshirt with the reversible side in grey, blue and navy blue stripes, made of 100% cotton, full front zipper, brand print in graphic and rubber print on the left chest of the navy blue side, pockets on the waist of either side, and a ribbed hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron only, but do not iron on print Get two for the price of one! This reversible hooded sweatshirt from status quo is crafted from soft cotton fabric is sure to keep you warm this winter. Layer it over jeans and t-shirts and wear it either ways to suit your style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
